goalText: Hunt 15 Deer with Tiger strikes before moves run out
note: Rules per KING_OF_JUNGLE_DESIGN_RULES.md — Zone I Starter Plains. Grid always 6x6, Zone I animals only, no blockers at Level 1.
tutorialHint: Match Tigers beside Deer. Deer-only matches scatter, but they do not count as hunts.
difficultyNote: Level 1 keeps the required 30 moves and 6x6 Zone I board, but only Tiger food-chain attacks count toward the Deer objective so the level cannot auto-clear from random Deer matches.
animationRequirements: Tiger pounce trails when predator matches hunt adjacent Deer or Goat
Prey-hit dissolve, jungle particles, cascade drop-in, and new-spawn animations
Special match effects for 5-in-row, cross, and 2x2 blast patterns
